features.featureTitle: Update GamesSection.tsx to handle and display the expanded list of 100 games. Update the hardcoded fallback games array in GamesSection.tsx to mirror the full 100-game backend list. Ensure the responsive grid layout renders correctly with the larger dataset — consider adding a search/filter input or genre filter badges so users can browse the large catalog. The existing GamePlayer modal must remain functional for all game entries.

Update ShowsSection.tsx to handle and display the expanded list of 100 shows/movies. Update the hardcoded fallback shows array in ShowsSection.tsx to mirror the full 100-entry backend list. Ensure the responsive grid layout renders correctly with the larger dataset — consider adding a search/filter input or genre filter badges. The existing VideoPlayer modal must remain functional for all show/movie entries.
